title: Add Twitch Gemini Chatbot to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Chat is buzzing
gist.blurb: A new Twitch Gemini Chatbot just landed in the greenhouse! Now your stream chat can generate media and talk to Gemini 24/7 without writing a single line of code.
gist.summary: Added the Twitch Gemini Chatbot to the community apps showcase, enabling zero-code AI chat and media generation for livestreams.
gist.impact: Streamers can now easily integrate 24/7 interactive Gemini conversations and Pollinations media generation directly into their Twitch chats.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy streaming setup. The bee mascot wearing a little streamer headset with a mic, sitting in front of a retro monitor showing a Twitch-like chat interface with purple accents. The monitor robot acts as a chat moderator.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny streamer headset with a microphone, sitting at a retro computer setup. The glowing monitor shows a purple-themed streaming chat interface. A chunky monitor robot sits nearby acting as a chat moderator. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
